description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the golang:1.9 Docker image and a REPO_NAME variable set to gitlab.com/i-tre-brutti/common. Define two stages: test and build. Add a before_script that creates the GOPATH src directory for $REPO_NAME, symlinks the project directory, cd into it, runs go get -u github.com/golang/dep/cmd/dep and dep ensure, which applies to all jobs. In the test stage add a test job that runs go test ./... . In the build stage add a build job that runs go build ./... . No caches, artifacts, or special rules are defined.
